problem: If Jeff picks one letter randomly from the alphabet, what is the probability that the letter is in the word `PROBABILITY'?

classified_questions.question: Can you list the letters that are used in the word PROBABILITY?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many letters are there in the alphabet?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Since the word PROBABILITY uses 9 different letters, what is the probability that Jeff will choose one of these letters if he picks one letter randomly out of the alphabet?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Is there any difference in the probability if Jeff picks a letter from a set that includes only the letters used in the word PROBABILITY?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: If Jeff has already picked a letter, what is the probability that it is one of the letters used in the word PROBABILITY?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you think of any other words that use a similar set of letters? Would the probability be the same or different?
classified_questions.label: e
